plan_metadata.name: Basic Custom Engine Agent Azure OpenAI py Remote Debug

steps.description: Select "Python" from the Programming Language dropdown menu in Visual Studio Code by clicking on the "Python" option.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" selection prompt to choose or locate the project's root folder.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in Visual Studio Code while the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension is active.
Type 'deploy' into the VS Code command palette input field at the top center of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit workspace.
Press Enter to execute the ">deploy" command in the VS Code command palette.
Click the "Deploy" button in the confirmation dialog asking "Do you want to deploy resources in dev environment?" within Visual Studio Code.
Click the center area of the Visual Studio Code editor window, on the main workspace where the VS Code logo is displayed, to focus the editor.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code with the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension active.
Type 'Notifications: Show Notifications' into the VS Code Command Palette input box at the top of the window.
Press Enter to select the "Notifications: Show Notifications" command from the VS Code command palette.
@code there is a notification showing "actions in deploy stage executed successfully".
